non_findings: Existing validators remain authoritative for project installs, authority envelopes, epistemic manifests, artifact state, bounded agency, and privacy scans.
Archive transcripts are not treated as orphaned merely because they are not customer-routed.
Ordinary findings do not affect command exit status.
